products.nameZh: 定制CNC铝合金精密加工件

广泛应用于航空航天、汽车、电子设备和医疗器械等行业。标准产品交期15-20个工作日，复杂件需另议。
products.detailsEn:
We specialize in producing precision aluminum alloy parts (e.g., 6061, 7075) using advanced CNC machining technology. Diverse material options and customizable surface treatments are available.

Capable of handling a wide range of sizes with tolerances up to ±0.01mm. Supports CAD/CAM file import and provides 3D measurement reports. Can process complex geometries and fine threads.

Widely used in aerospace, automotive, electronics, and medical devices. Standard lead time is 15-20 business days; complex parts may vary.

可实现微小尺寸和复杂内腔加工，表面光洁度可达Ra 0.4。严格的质量控制贯穿整个生产流程。

适用于泵、阀门、医疗设备、食品机械等领域。标准件交期10-15个工作日。
products.detailsEn:
We offer precision turning services for various stainless steel grades (e.g., 304, 316, 17-4PH). Utilizing multi-axis CNC lathes ensures high accuracy and repeatability.

Capable of micro-machining and complex internal cavity processing, achieving surface roughness as low as Ra 0.4. Strict quality control throughout the production process.

Ideal for pumps, valves, medical devices, and food machinery. Standard lead time is 10-15 business days.
products.seoTitle: Precision Stainless Steel Turned Parts Manufacturer
